title: Clean up old adapter files after migration
description:
Delete old adapter files that are replaced by the new provider architecture.

## Context
Part of OpenRouter pivot. See docs/plans/2026-01-29-openrouter-pivot-design.md for full design.

## Files to delete

### Old adapter interface
- generator/src/lib/models/adapter.ts - Generic ModelAdapter interface no longer needed

### Old text adapters
- generator/src/lib/models/text/claude.ts - Bedrock-specific Claude formatting (moved to openrouter provider)

### Old image adapters
- generator/src/lib/models/image/stability.ts - Moved to bedrock provider
- generator/src/lib/models/image/sd3.ts - Moved to bedrock provider  
- generator/src/lib/models/image/titan.ts - No longer used (Titan dropped)

### Old invoker
- generator/src/utils/bedrock.ts - Generic invokeModel no longer needed

## Verification
Before deleting, verify:
1. No imports reference these files
2. Pipeline runs successfully with new providers
3. All model-specific logic has been migrated

## Dependencies
- Depends on unicorn.io-beb (pipeline integration complete)

title: Update webapp with new model display names
description:
Update webapp/src/consts.ts with display names for new models.

## Context
Part of OpenRouter pivot. See docs/plans/2026-01-29-openrouter-pivot-design.md for full design.

## Requirements

### Update modelMap
Add entries for new models with numeric IDs for S3 path encoding:

New image models:

- NanoBananaPro (google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview)

New text models:
- GPT4o (openai/gpt-4o)
- Gemini25Flash (google/gemini-2.5-flash)
- Llama32Vision90B (meta-llama/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct)

Keep existing Stability and Claude model mappings.

### Update display name mapping
Ensure model IDs can be converted to human-readable names for UI display.

## Files

- Reference: generator/src/lib/models/types.ts for enum values

## Note
This can be done in parallel with generator changes - no code dependency, just needs to match the new enum values.

title: tsc fails on src/index.ts:50 — imageModels[modelId] possibly undefined
description:
## Symptom
`npm run build` (tsc --noEmit) fails:

  src/index.ts(50,33): error TS2722: Cannot invoke an object which is possibly 'undefined'.

## Why
generator/src/lib/models/registry.ts declares `imageModels: Partial<Record<ImageModels, ImageAdapter>>` so `imageModels[modelId]` is `ImageAdapter | undefined`. index.ts then calls the adapter without a null guard.

This does not block deployment (sam uses esbuild, not tsc), but it does break `npm run build` and obscures real type regressions.

## Fix options
- Narrow the registry type to `Record<ImageModels, ImageAdapter>` and explicitly drop the commented-out Bedrock entries (or keep them and assert all keys are populated).
- Add a runtime guard in invokeImageModel: `if (!adapter) throw new Error(...)`.

## Discovered from
unicorn.io-d0a (max_tokens cap work, 2026-05-27)

title: Add email subscription management
description:
Allow users to subscribe/unsubscribe from daily unicorn emails.

## Requirements
- Signup form in webapp for new subscribers
- Subscription storage (DynamoDB or similar)
- Unsubscribe link in emails
- Preference management (frequency, pause)

## Considerations
- GDPR compliance for email collection
- Double opt-in confirmation
- Subscription list management UI

title: Create model registry with selection helpers
description:
Create lib/models/registry.ts that maps model enums to provider adapters.

## Context
Part of OpenRouter pivot. See docs/plans/2026-01-29-openrouter-pivot-design.md for full design.

## Requirements

### imageModels registry
Map ImageModels enum to adapter functions:
- StableCore, StableUltra, SD3Large -> bedrock.image()
- NanoBanana, NanoBananaPro, GPT5Image -> openrouter.image()

### textModels registry
Map TextModels enum to adapter functions:
- All models -> openrouter.text()

### Selection helpers
- randomImageModel(): returns random ImageModels enum key
- randomTextModel(): returns random TextModels enum key
- Use Object.keys() and Math.random()

## Example
```typescript
export const imageModels = {
  [ImageModels.StableCore]: bedrock.image(ImageModels.StableCore),
  [ImageModels.NanoBanana]: openrouter.image(ImageModels.NanoBanana),
  // ...
};

export const randomImageModel = () => {
  const keys = Object.keys(imageModels) as ImageModels[];
  return keys[Math.floor(Math.random() * keys.length)];
};
```

## Files
- Create: generator/src/lib/models/registry.ts
- Import from: lib/providers/bedrock.ts, lib/providers/openrouter.ts, lib/models/types.ts

## Dependencies
- Depends on unicorn.io-kq4 (bedrock provider)
- Depends on unicorn.io-ck5 (openrouter provider)

title: Update pipeline to use new model registry
Create OpenRouter provider adapter for image and text models
description:
Create lib/providers/openrouter.ts with self-contained adapter factories for OpenRouter models.

## Context
Part of OpenRouter pivot. See docs/plans/2026-01-29-openrouter-pivot-design.md for full design.

## Requirements

### openrouter.image() factory
Returns ImageAdapter: (input: { prompt: string }) => Promise<string> (base64)
- Use OpenRouter chat completions API with modalities: ['image']
- Endpoint: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1/chat/completions
- Auth: Bearer token from OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var
- Models: NanoBanana, NanoBananaPro, GPT5Image

### openrouter.text() factory  
Returns TextAdapter: (input: { prompt: string; imgB64: string }) => Promise<DescriptionJson>
- Use OpenRouter chat completions API with vision message format
- Pass image as base64 in message content array
- Models: Claude45Sonnet, GPT4o, Gemini25Flash, Llama32Vision90B
- Parse response to extract JSON (handle markdown code blocks)

### Common
- Map enum values to OpenRouter model IDs
- Error handling: catch fetch errors, non-200 responses, parse errors
- Rethrow with model context for debugging

## Files
- Create: generator/src/lib/providers/openrouter.ts
- Reference: generator/src/lib/models/text/claude.ts for vision message format pattern
- Import types from: generator/src/lib/models/types.ts

## Environment
- OPENROUTER_API_KEY already in .env

## Dependencies
- Depends on unicorn.io-uq0 (model types)

title: Cap max_tokens on OpenRouter image adapter to fix daily 402 errors
description:
## Symptom
Daily generator lambda has been failing since 2026-05-07. Last successful generation: 2026-05-06 (unicorn Pegasus).

## Root cause
OpenRouter image() adapter sends no max_tokens, so OpenRouter pre-reserves the model's worst-case max_tokens against the key's monthly budget. The current key budget can only afford ~6825 tokens, but the reservation is ~29466. All three OpenRouter image models (NanoBanana, NanoBananaPro, GPT5Image) fail with HTTP 402.

Example error from CloudWatch (/aws/lambda/unicorn-io-UnicornProxyFn-5HhqpZ7XlJWq):
> OpenRouter google/gemini-2.5-flash-image: 402 - This request requires more credits, or fewer max_tokens. You requested up to 29466 tokens, but can only afford 6825.

## Fix
Cap max_tokens on the image-modality request in generator/src/lib/providers/openrouter.ts so the reservation stays under the key budget. We don't use the text portion of the image response, so a small cap is safe.

## Verification
- Add vitest spec mocking fetch and asserting body includes max_tokens
- Tail CloudWatch after next deploy / manual invoke to confirm successful generation

## Out of scope
Bedrock fallback re-enablement (commented out in registry.ts); key rotation; OpenRouter budget bump (Darren handles separately).

title: Create Bedrock provider adapter for Stability image models
description:
Create lib/providers/bedrock.ts with self-contained adapter factory for Stability image models.

## Context
Part of OpenRouter pivot. See docs/plans/2026-01-29-openrouter-pivot-design.md for full design.

## Requirements

Create bedrock.image() factory function that returns ImageAdapter:
- Takes ImageModels enum value
- Returns async function: (input: { prompt: string }) => Promise<string> (base64)
- Encapsulates BedrockRuntimeClient setup, InvokeModelCommand formatting, and response parsing
- Use bedrockParams from utils/consts.ts for client config

Model-specific formatting for Stability models:
- StableCore, StableUltra, SD3Large each have different request formats
- Reference existing logic in lib/models/image/stability.ts and lib/models/image/sd3.ts

Error handling:
- Catch Bedrock errors and rethrow with model context

## Files
- Create: generator/src/lib/providers/bedrock.ts
- Reference: generator/src/lib/models/image/stability.ts, sd3.ts for formatting logic
- Reference: generator/src/utils/bedrock.ts for current client setup
- Import types from: generator/src/lib/models/types.ts (created in prior task)

## Dependencies
- Depends on unicorn.io-uq0 (model types)

title: Create model type enums for multi-provider architecture
description:
Create lib/models/types.ts with updated enums for image and text models.

## Context
Part of OpenRouter pivot. See docs/plans/2026-01-29-openrouter-pivot-design.md for full design.

## Requirements

Create ImageModels enum:
- Bedrock Stability: StableCore ('stability.stable-image-core-v1:0'), StableUltra ('stability.stable-image-ultra-v1:0'), SD3Large ('stability.sd3-large-v1:0')
- OpenRouter: NanoBanana ('google/gemini-2.5-flash-image'), NanoBananaPro ('google/gemini-3-pro-image-preview'), GPT5Image ('openai/gpt-5-image')

Create TextModels enum (all OpenRouter):
- Claude45Sonnet ('anthropic/claude-sonnet-4.5')
- GPT4o ('openai/gpt-4o')
- Gemini25Flash ('google/gemini-2.5-flash')
- Llama32Vision90B ('meta-llama/llama-3.2-90b-vision-instruct')

Export adapter type definitions:
- ImageAdapter = (input: { prompt: string }) => Promise<string>
- TextAdapter = (input: { prompt: string; imgB64: string }) => Promise<DescriptionJson>

## Files
- Create: generator/src/lib/models/types.ts
- Reference existing: generator/src/lib/models/adapter.ts for current enum patterns

title: Reconcile SAM template/samconfig IaC drift
description:
## Drift
- OPENROUTER_API_KEY is set on the deployed Lambda (unicorn-io-UnicornProxyFn-*) but is NOT declared in generator/template.yaml. Source of truth has drifted from IaC to the AWS console.
- generator/samconfig.toml parameter_overrides reference /UNICORN/* SSM paths and a TOPICNAME parameter that does not exist in template.yaml (which declares /BESTIARY/* paths and no TOPICNAME). The TOPICNAME override is dead.

## Fix
- Add an OpenRouterApiKey parameter to template.yaml referencing an SSM SecureString at /BESTIARY/OPENROUTER_API_KEY (or similar); plumb it into the Lambda env block.
- Drop the TOPICNAME override from samconfig.toml.
- Reconcile /UNICORN/* vs /BESTIARY/* path naming (pick one; current SSM values appear to live under /UNICORN/* per samconfig).

## Verification
- sam build && sam deploy --profile personal succeeds.
- aws lambda get-function-configuration shows OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var still present and sourced from SSM.

## Dependencies
Depends on Darren creating the SSM SecureString param under whatever path we pick (and rotating the key value in the process).
